targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  table,
  max_observed_at,
  dateDiff('minute', max_observed_at, now()) AS age_minutes,
  lignes
FROM
(
  SELECT 'profile_decisions' AS table, nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) AS max_observed_at, count() AS lignes FROM prediction_core.profile_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'debug_decisions', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_signals', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'profile_metrics', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_metrics', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.strategy_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_orders', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_positions', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.paper_positions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_pnl_snapshots', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'execution_events', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.execution_events WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_configs', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), count() FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
)
ORDER BY age_minutes DESC

SELECT
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(parseDateTimeBestEffortOrNull(argMax(run_id, observed_at)), 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière run (Paris)`,
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')), 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière observation (Paris)`,
  count() AS `Lignes`
FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id
ORDER BY max(observed_at) DESC

SELECT `Table`, `Lignes` FROM
(
  SELECT 'profile_decisions' AS `Table`, count() AS `Lignes` FROM prediction_core.profile_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'debug_decisions', count() FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_signals', count() FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'profile_metrics', count() FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_metrics', count() FROM prediction_core.strategy_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_orders', count() FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_positions', count() FROM prediction_core.paper_positions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_pnl_snapshots', count() FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'execution_events', count() FROM prediction_core.execution_events WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_configs', count() FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
)
ORDER BY `Lignes` DESC

SELECT
  `Table`,
  if(isNull(max_observed_at), '', formatDateTime(toTimeZone(max_observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S')) AS `Dernière observation (Paris)`,
  age_minutes AS `Âge minutes`
FROM
(
  SELECT `Table`, max_observed_at, dateDiff('minute', max_observed_at, now()) AS age_minutes
  FROM
  (
    SELECT 'profile_decisions' AS `Table`, nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) AS max_observed_at FROM prediction_core.profile_decisions
    UNION ALL SELECT 'debug_decisions', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
    UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_signals', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
    UNION ALL SELECT 'profile_metrics', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
    UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_metrics', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.strategy_metrics
    UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_orders', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.paper_orders
    UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_positions', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.paper_positions
    UNION ALL SELECT 'paper_pnl_snapshots', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.paper_pnl_snapshots
    UNION ALL SELECT 'execution_events', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.execution_events
    UNION ALL SELECT 'strategy_configs', nullIf(max(observed_at), toDateTime64(0, 3, 'UTC')) FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  )
)
WHERE age_minutes > 60 OR max_observed_at IS NULL
ORDER BY age_minutes DESC
